app_description: FastAPI + pydantic-ai. User identity = phone number stored in DB. No per-conversation UUID — phone number is the only identifier. Multi-turn chat, users can start fresh conversations.

assertions.description: Surfaces the issue that phone number outlives sessions and cannot be used as session_id
Proposes generating a UUID per conversation (not using phone as session_id)
Passes stable identifier (phone) as user_id= in agentic_session()
kelet.configure() is still added at startup
